[DQC.US.0001.83] The member GeographicDistributionDomesticMember is inappropriately used on the axis RetirementPlanSponsorLocationAxis. The only members allowed on this axis are extension members defined by the filer and the following members in the US-GAAP taxonomy BW, PT, UG, CR, IM, MiddleEastMember, LB, CM, GW, MN, SG, SI, SE, MG, KN, UZ, EMEAMember, JM, FR, TK, NorthAmericaMember, AI, DK, BS, PS, GR, CC, IS, NR, YE, ForeignPlanMember, PR, YT, ST, WF, NL, BV, CA, UA, SoutheastRegionMember, AU, DM, LS, MW, AF, CI, IL, EuropeMember, CH, TO, GY, ME, SX, SK, GF, GL, LC, VU, AfricaMember, IT, PA, QA, EastRegionMember, AQ, DJ, EH, BR, CV, CO, IN, NP, AZ, ER, NC, NU, LR, MY, MX, SA, BJ, SY, TT, AE, SouthwestRegionMember, ZM, PG, TF, GD, AL, HR, BH, KP, PF, RE, HT, MS, JP, EE, KI, KY, MF, VA, SB, IO, NF, MV, MidwestRegionMember, AG, EuropeanUnionMember, BM, LY, TN, KM, ID, EC, KR, TW, GP, FM, SN, NZ, LK, GA, RO, GB, WestRegionMember, ZW, MP, PY, CF, DZ, CU, BD, ET, LI, ML, HM, MA, JE, PM, VE, BT, SO, TR, TJ, KW, BN, GU, NorthRegionMember, AR, LatinAmericaMember, SD, PE, RU, CG, IR, EG, FK, GM, TD, MQ, RS, NI, NO, BG, MT, US, SouthAmericaMember, AX, RetirementPlanSponsorLocationDomain, LT, TM, AS, CW, BB, BO, TZ, GT, HN, MZ, JO, KG, GE, RW, VC, VN, ZA, SR, PH, AmericasMember, NortheastRegionMember, AM, NonUsMember, FO, BF, CL, CD, IQ, SV, OM, LU, MH, MD, SC, NE, BQ, TH, TC, UM, AsiaMember, BY, LA, DE, GG, AD, CY, KZ, SJ, PN, BL, HK, MM, GS, FJ, BI, CN, WS, VG, GQ, PK, MO, SegmentGeographicalDomain, NorthwestRegionMember, AW, NG, DomesticPlanMember, TL, MR, CK, IE, BE, BA, GH, TV, MC, SL, KE, LV, PL, GN, UY, AsiaPacificMember, SS, SZ, KH, SH, AO, CZ, ES, FI, MK, CentralAmericaMember, HU, NA, PW, TG, CX, SM, VI, BZ, GI, MU, SouthRegionMember, AT, DO .
